'''鈭歴-t-n''' ('''satana''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:poeticise|poeticise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-t-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:poeticise|poeticise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴-t-n
|-
! Lemma
| satana
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:satanithi|satanithi]] || [[word:sataniji|sataniji]] || [[word:satanishi|satanishi]] || [[word:satani|satani]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:satanuthuth|satanuthuth]] || [[word:satanujuj|satanujuj]] || [[word:satanushush|satanushush]] || [[word:satan|satan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:satanuthu|satanuthu]] || [[word:satanuju|satanuju]] || [[word:satanushu|satanushu]] || [[word:satanu|satanu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:satanufuth|satanufuth]] || [[word:satanufuj|satanufuj]] || [[word:satanufush|satanufush]] || [[word:satanuf|satanuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:satanethe|satanethe]] || [[word:sataneje|sataneje]] || [[word:sataneshe|sataneshe]] || [[word:satane|satane]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:satanothoth|satanothoth]] || [[word:satanojoj|satanojoj]] || [[word:satanoshosh|satanoshosh]] || [[word:satan|satan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:satanotho|satanotho]] || [[word:satanojo|satanojo]] || [[word:satanosho|satanosho]] || [[word:satano|satano]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:satanofoth|satanofoth]] || [[word:satanofoj|satanofoj]] || [[word:satanofosh|satanofosh]] || [[word:satanof|satanof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:satan忙th忙|satan忙th忙]] || [[word:satan忙j忙|satan忙j忙]] || [[word:satan忙sh忙|satan忙sh忙]] || [[word:satan忙|satan忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:satanathath|satanathath]] || [[word:satanajaj|satanajaj]] || [[word:satanashash|satanashash]] || [[word:satan|satan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:satanatha|satanatha]] || [[word:satanaja|satanaja]] || [[word:satanasha|satanasha]] || [[word:satana|satana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:satanafath|satanafath]] || [[word:satanafaj|satanafaj]] || [[word:satanafash|satanafash]] || [[word:satanaf|satanaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:satanasha|satanasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosatanasha|gosatanasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisatanasha|gokisatanasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:satan眉sha|satan眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosatankn眉sha|gosatankn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisatan眉sha|gokisatan眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:satansh毛sha|satansh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosatanksh毛sha|gosatanksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisatansh毛sha|gokisatansh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:satanrosha|satanrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosatankrosha|gosatankrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisatanrosha|gokisatanrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:satanmusha|satanmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosatankmusha|gosatankmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisatanmusha|gokisatanmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:satansherasha|satansherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosatanksherasha|gosatanksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisatansherasha|gokisatansherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:satangasha|satangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosatankngasha|gosatankngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisatangasha|gokisatangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:satanyasha|satanyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosatankyasha|gosatankyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisatanyasha|gokisatanyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:satanyamasha|satanyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosatankyamasha|gosatankyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisatanyamasha|gokisatanyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:satan眉sh毛sha|satan眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosatankn眉sh毛sha|gosatankn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisatan眉sh毛sha|gokisatan眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:satan眉rosha|satan眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosatankn眉rosha|gosatankn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisatan眉rosha|gokisatan眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:satan眉musha|satan眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosatankn眉musha|gosatankn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisatan眉musha|gokisatan眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:satansh毛n眉sha|satansh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosatanksh毛n眉sha|gosatanksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisatansh毛n眉sha|gokisatansh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:satansh毛rosha|satansh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosatanksh毛rosha|gosatanksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisatansh毛rosha|gokisatansh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:satansh毛musha|satansh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosatanksh毛musha|gosatanksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisatansh毛musha|gokisatansh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:satanron眉sha|satanron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosatankron眉sha|gosatankron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisatanron眉sha|gokisatanron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:satanrosh毛sha|satanrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosatankrosh毛sha|gosatankrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisatanrosh毛sha|gokisatanrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:satanromusha|satanromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosatankromusha|gosatankromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisatanromusha|gokisatanromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:satanmun眉sha|satanmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosatankmun眉sha|gosatankmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisatanmun眉sha|gokisatanmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:satanmush毛sha|satanmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosatankmush毛sha|gosatankmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisatanmush毛sha|gokisatanmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:satanmurosha|satanmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosatankmurosha|gosatankmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisatanmurosha|gokisatanmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:satan|satan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:s忙t忙n|s忙t忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hosatan|hosatan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hos忙t忙n|hos忙t忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosatan|hohosatan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohos忙t忙n|hohos忙t忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉satan|n眉satan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉s忙t忙n|n眉s忙t忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉satan|n眉n眉satan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉s忙t忙n|n眉n眉s忙t忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂satan|n茂satan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂s忙t忙n|n茂s忙t忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂satan|n茂n茂satan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂s忙t忙n|n茂n茂s忙t忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lusatan|lusatan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lus忙t忙n|lus忙t忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulusatan|lulusatan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulus忙t忙n|lulus忙t忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lisatan|lisatan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lis忙t忙n|lis忙t忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilisatan|lilisatan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilis忙t忙n|lilis忙t忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kosatan|kosatan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kos忙t忙n|kos忙t忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosatan|kokosatan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokos忙t忙n|kokos忙t忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kesatan|kesatan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kes忙t忙n|kes忙t忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesatan|kekesatan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekes忙t忙n|kekes忙t忙n]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
